creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
upgrade print/acroread8 and other sub ports to 8.1.4.
	ref: http://www.adobe.com/support/security/bulletins/apsb09-04.html

Fix: here is a patch to print/acroread8:


in addition, many sub ports for each languages should be updated.
	here is a list about distinfo of each ports:

Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ur Makefile.orig Makefile
--- Makefile.orig	2009-03-20 05:44:53.000000000 +0900
+++ Makefile	2009-03-25 11:46:57.000000000 +0900
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	acroread8
-PORTVERSION=	8.1.3
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	8.1.4
 CATEGORIES?=	print linux
 MASTER_SITES?=	http://ardownload.adobe.com/pub/adobe/reader/unix/8.x/${PORTVERSION}/${ADOBE_LANG:L}/ \
 		ftp://ftp.adobe.com/pub/adobe/reader/unix/8.x/${PORTVERSION}/${ADOBE_LANG:L}/
diff -ur acroread8.orig/distinfo acroread8/distinfo
--- distinfo.orig	2008-11-08 21:20:31.000000000 +0900
+++ distinfo	2009-03-25 11:10:11.000000000 +0900
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (acroread/AdobeReader_enu-8.1.3-1.i486.tar.bz2) = c85096f401772f435866a66ec06352f1
